flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Morgan State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Morgan State University rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 (7.0k → 9.0k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Morgan State University fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($30.5k → $27.2k).
